title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 545.810 - Defendant granted reasonable time to plead
text:
545.810.  Defendant granted reasonable time to plead. — The defendant in an indictment or information in a court of record, shall not be required to plead thereto until he shall have had a reasonable time in which to examine the same and to prepare his pleading.
(RSMo 1939 § 4002) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 3613
